source.name: OCC Daily Volume Statistics — marketdata.theocc.com
source.note: Operator-downloaded OCC Daily Volume Statistics CSV (reportDate=20260701). indexOptionsContracts maps to OCC Index/Others column. Prior session from reportDate=20260630. Verified with npm run ghostflow:options-data-spike. ETF split and put/call ratio not in this OCC table.

caveats: OCC Daily Volume Statistics — Index/Others column, not a dedicated index-only options line
Aggregate cleared OCC contract volume — not 0DTE, same-day expiry, or dealer gamma/GEX
Not included in the Research Composite; mappingStatus not_final
Distinct from CBOE VIX-based optionsVolatilityAmplifier (vol level, not contract activity)
Put/call ratio and ETF split not present in official daily-volume-statistics CSV
